growth_records.lvlwhy: the source paper (often a review/modeling reuse) states no strain
growth_records.cite: Vaca et al. Contemporary diagnostics for medically relevant fastidious microorganisms belonging to the genera Anaplasma, Bartonella, Coxiella, Orientia and Rickettsia. FEMS Microbiology Reviews (2022). DOI:10.1093/femsre/fuac013. [PMC9300619]
growth_records.snippet: culture techniques (e.g. microaerophilic incubation on Columbia blood-agar plates ...) are hampered due to the fastidious nature and slow growth characteristics of the bacteria (doubling time ∼24 h)
growth_records.notes: Review article statement (not primary data from this paper) giving doubling time ~24 h for Bartonella spp. on Columbia blood-agar under microaerophilic conditions; no strain, temperature or medium composition specified. growth_rate_per_h calculated as ln2/24=0.0289 h-1 from the stated doubling time (formula: mu=ln2/DT, DT=24h).
